SEARCH
Package com.example.getoutthere.organizer

Class WaitlistFragmentTest

java.lang.Object
com.example.getoutthere.organizer.WaitlistFragmentTest
public class WaitlistFragmentTest extends Object
Instrumented tests for WaitlistFragment. These tests verify that the fragment launches correctly, receives the event ID argument, and displays the main UI elements. Before running these tests, replace TEST_EVENT_ID with a real event ID from Firebase.

    void

    Verifies that clicking the draw lottery button does not crash the fragment.
